A mysterious doll. It has a faded-looking letter in its hands.
\#This doll's been sitting in my house for years.
\#I remember seeing an identical one at Bohelos's market.
\#A creepy doll no one would buy. She spent so long watching
\#Bohelos that something strange happened to her.
\#She bears the exact same scars my doll does. When my doll's
\#damaged, the same damage appears on her. The doll in my
\#house and the doll at the market... are connected.
\#Stranger still, I can tell the market doll's older than mine.
\#Her hair's brittle, and her arm looks like it'd snap if
\#I think these dolls share a connection that surpasses time.
\#I hope they do. That's why there's something I can do.
\#I put a letter in my doll's hands. I don't know just how connected
\#they are. I can only hope my wishes will be able to travel back
\#The continent's filled with nothing but slaves now. Other than
\#a handful of select imperials, humans have become nothing
\#Life isn't some pebble to be easily overturned. Mankind has no
\#power left, but if there were some way to go back...
\#If there were some way to go back to when the demons invaded,
\#to when there were those who could stand up to the Empire...
\#If there were some way for the demons to topple the Empire...
\#That's why I wrote my letters. I want to do whatever I can to help
\#the demons. I want to give them whatever information I can.
\#Maybe my letters were found by a person from Bohelos and thrown
\#away. Maybe a bunch of my letters were thrown away.
\#I hated the demons too, but they're the only ones who could ever
\#defeat the Empire. I know it sounds unbelievable, but...
\#If this letter finds its way to the demons, check the back of
\#this doll. I hope my treasure can help you.

It's been three years since the demons appeared, and Bohelos is
A lot of people have died and lots of horrible things have happened.
I grew up here, but I barely recognize it anymore.
Still, a lot of slaves have been saved. I was told my great-grandpa
I kinda hope... this place stays the way it is now.
The demons and slaves... They seem to be running around a lot.
This arrow's been used so many times, it's become brittle.
A row of worn-out spears. They'd be no use in an actual battle.
Bohelos is under control of the demons, but for some reason the
trade routes are doing well and it's easy to do business here.
There are barely any middlemen, and the tariffs are all really low.
I'm keeping my guard up, but I'll be here for a while.

Now that the Empire doesn't have its fingers in the south,
tax rates should go way down!
I'm looking forward to all the future business!
